Defendant German Motor Corporation Dba Bmw Of San Francisco Dba Mini Of San Franciscos Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And To Stay The Instant Action
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION'S Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And To Stay The Instant Action is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
